Developer Help Center
Discord for Game Developers
Tools, integrations, and platform capabilities for game developers to tap into the power of Discord.
BUILD ON THE SOCIAL LAYER OF GAMES
Players already spend time together on Discord before, during, and after they play. Discord is where the social layer of games lives today and our developer platform lets you tap into that time to drive more players, more playtime, and more revenue for your game.
Reach into one of the world’s largest and most engaged gaming audiences
Daily Active Users
Play Video Games
Start a game within an hour
How Games Use Discord to Drive Growth
Connect your game to Discord
Stay top of mind beyond gameplay
Turn social activity into outcomes
Valuable individually. Incredibly powerful together.
Strong communities are incredibly valuable, but servers are not the whole story. Take advantage of Discord's entire platform to win more players, more playtime, and more revenue.
Connect Your Game
Activate Account Linking, enabling players to connect their game and Discord accounts and unlock richer cross-platform social experiences to support greater engagement, retention, and reach.
Monetize Beyond the Game
Sell in-game items directly through Discord, in the social spaces where players and their friends already spend time together, expanding your potential buyer pool and helping to drive incremental revenue.
Expand Your Community
Create and manage your game’s official server, where players can gather, coordinate, and stay connected between sessions. Extend your game with apps that support coordination, automation, and community-driven experiences.
Reach New Players
Run rewarded, opt-in ads on Discord that turn gameplay into discovery. Players complete in-game objectives and share progress socially, helping new players find your game through trusted, friend-led context.
Games Unlocking Discord’s Full Potential
See how game teams are building beyond the server and using the full breadth of Discord’s developer solutions to gain a competitive edge.
What Games Have Seen in Practice
When games integrate with Discord’s developer platform, they can see clear results.
Higher return play from linked players
Meaningful lift from social-driven discovery
Incremental revenue beyond the game
For Builders
Ready to get started? Jump straight into the tools and documentation.
Documentation

Developer Channels
Make Discord Work for Your Game
Your players already spend time on Discord. Contact us to learn how we can help you turn that time into real outcomes for your game.
